request.task: Build an application settings page for profile, security, notifications, billing, and appearance preferences
Build a kanban board for project tasks with draggable columns, cards, filters, assignees, and due dates
Build a notification center with unread alerts, filters, timestamps, and mark all as read
Build a file manager with folders, list and grid views, upload, search, breadcrumbs, and storage details
Build a calendar application with month and week views, events, scheduling, and a mini calendar
Build an email client with inbox, folders, message list, reading pane, compose, search, and labels
Build a markdown editor with a file tree, editor, live preview, formatting toolbar, and export
Build a code playground with an editor, syntax highlighting, run controls, console output, and preview
Build a visual SQL query builder with schema tables, joins, conditions, generated query, and results
Build a database browser with tables, schema inspector, SQL console, data grid, and query history
Build a spreadsheet application with a formula bar, editable cells, sheet tabs, charts, and formatting controls
Build a project timeline and Gantt chart with task dependencies, milestones, assignees, and date controls
Build a contacts manager with people list, search, groups, profile detail, notes, and recent activity
Build a flashcard study app with decks, spaced repetition, progress, review controls, and keyboard shortcuts
Build an analytics dashboard for service telemetry with time series charts, metrics, logs, and incident status
Build a glitch image editor with RGB channel offsets, scanlines, distortion controls, presets, and export
Build a gradient generator with color stops, angle controls, live preview, CSS output, presets, and copy
Build a duotone image tool with upload, two color controls, live preview, blend modes, and export
Build an interactive audio visual instrument with knobs, sequencer controls, waveform visualization, presets, and recording
Build developer documentation with sidebar navigation, quickstart steps, API examples, code snippets, and search
